summary: PG-003 execution complete. All 48 PG tests pass against PGlite (0 failures). The `test:pg` CI script and `pg-test` CI job are now fully operational.

fixes_applied.fix: DatabaseAdapter.PgAdapter(pgDir, false) → DatabaseAdapter.PgAdapter({ connectionString: pgDir, ssl: false })
fixes_applied.reason: PgAdapter takes an options object, not positional args
PgAdapter layer involves async Effect fibers (HealthRegistry check) that can't resolve synchronously
DuckDBAdapter uses dynamic import, making initialization inherently async
PGlite and node-postgres expose execute() returning { rows: [...] }, not SQLite-style run()/all()

fixes_applied.issue: Pg adapter retry behavior differs from SQLite
fixes_applied.reason: Pg adapter only retries on serialization errors (pg code 40001), not on plain thrown Errors

fixes_applied.issue: Missing closing brace for PgAdapter describe block
fixes_applied.reason: Caused parse error 'Unexpected end of file' in test runner

pre_existing_findings.note: Documented as TODO(phase2) — error isolation in Database.transaction effects loop

pre_existing_findings.issue: process.env pollution when run alongside PG tests
pre_existing_findings.note: Not a CI concern — pg-test job only runs *.pg.test.ts files
